2.reason: [错误原因：C语言不能包含C++标准库头文件<iostream>，会导致编译失败]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  在C程序中不应包含C++头文件，可能导致编译错误或警告
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [错误原因：C语言不能包含C++标准库头文件<iostream>，会导致编译失败]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  This is a C++ header and will cause a compilation error in a standard C compiler; it should be removed.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  C++ header file included in a C program, which will cause a compilation error.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Including <iostream> is invalid in C; this causes a compilation error because <iostream> is a C++ header]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Including <iostream> is invalid in C; this causes a compilation error because <iostream> is a C++ header]

4.reason: 数组大小可能过小，若单词长度超过19或单词数量超过105会导致溢出

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  数组大小可能过小，若单词长度超过19或单词数量超过105会导致溢出

15.reason: 未检查fopen返回值，文件不存在时将错误

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  未检查fopen返回值，文件不存在时将错误

17.reason: Using ~fscanf() is unsafe; if fscanf returns 0, ~0 is non-zero, causing an infinite loop. Should use fscanf(...) != EOF.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  fscanf返回值检查方式不够标准，但功能正确
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Using bitwise NOT on fscanf's return value is non-standard and unsafe; should check for EOF or successful read count.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Using ~fscanf() is unsafe; if fscanf returns 0, ~0 is non-zero, causing an infinite loop. Should use fscanf(...) != EOF.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  若超出data列大小20，将越界

40.reason: Accessing data[id[0]] without checking if i > 0 may cause out-of-bounds access or incorrect output for empty files.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  错误：第一个单词的计数未被输出，且缺少换行，不符合输出格式
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Incorrect output format; does not match "word count\n" requirement and will crash if file is empty (i==0).
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Accessing data[id[0]] without checking if i > 0 may cause out-of-bounds access or incorrect output for empty files.

51.reason: Incorrect output format and order; prints count before word and misses required newline at the end of each line.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  错误：输出顺序和格式颠倒，应先输出单词再输出计数，且最后一行不应有歧义
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Incorrect output format and order; prints count before word and misses required newline at the end of each line.

55.reason: 逻辑复杂且可能错误：对于单个单词或多个单词的最后一行应有统一处理，且缺少末尾换行符

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  逻辑复杂且可能错误：对于单个单词或多个单词的最后一行应有统一处理，且缺少末尾换行符

32.reason: Missing null-terminator assignment data[i][j] = '\0'; before incrementing i, which may cause undefined behavior in string functions.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Missing null-terminator assignment (data[i][j] = '\0';) before incrementing i, causing undefined behavior in strcmp and printf.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Missing null-terminator assignment data[i][j] = '\0'; before incrementing i, which may cause undefined behavior in string functions.
